input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.6.1.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.6.1.6
            TITLE: cylinder material – gas cylinders/tanks in a position 150 mm or less from an exhaust system

            CONTENT:
            rule T.6.1.6: Cylinder Material – gas cylinders/tanks in a position 150 mm or less from an exhaust system
T.6.1.6 Cylinder Material – gas cylinders/tanks in a position 150 mm or less from an exhaust system 
must meet one of the two: 
• Made from metal
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 69 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
• Meet the thermal protection requirements of T.1.6.3

final_answer: T.6.1.6 Cylinder Material – gas cylinders/tanks in a position 150 mm or less from an exhaust system must meet one of the two: • Made from metal • Meet the thermal protection requirements of T.1.6.3
